title: Dark Embellished Stone (Advancement Plaques)
description: Derivate of Grend's texture pack for the Advancement Plaques mod. A darker look for those that like it!
body:
This texture pack is a derivate of [Grend's](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend) original [Embellished Stone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/embellished-stone-advancements-plaques). If you feel a darker look for the advancement plaques fits you more, then this pack is for you! **Note:** This resource pack **requires** the [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) mod to function. ### You **NEED** to do the following adjustments for the visuals to work: 1- Locate the `advancementplaques-common.toml` file inside the `config` directory of your Minecraft profile (the Advancement Plaques mod has to had been run at least once for the .toml file to be generated) 2- Open `advancementplaques-common.toml` with any text editor and change the following values: ```toml title_color = 4283759444 name_color = 4294967295 ``` 3- Save the file, and done :) enjoy!
You are allowed to use this resource anywhere, just remember that it relies on [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) to work!
